final_prompt.prompt:
Create a set of Amazon product listing photos for a hydration tumbler/water bottle by the lifestyle brand "Evergreen".

Style/medium: clean studio product photography with lifestyle inserts, photorealistic, inspired by premium DTC hydration brand visual identity (think Hydro Flask / Stanley editorial tone)
Composition: multi-shot layout — hero shot centered on white/light backdrop, one lifestyle context shot (outdoor/nature), one detail/texture close-up, one flat-lay or overhead arrangement; each frame with generous negative space and balanced padding
Subject: sleek hydration tumbler/water bottle branded "Evergreen", smooth matte or metallic-silver finish, minimal label design featuring a leaf icon motif, proportions consistent across all frames
Scene/backdrop: primary shots on clean white or very pale sky-blue studio sweep; lifestyle insert shows soft natural outdoor light with foliage or water texture in background
Lighting/mood: soft diffused studio lighting for product shots — no harsh shadows; lifestyle frame uses warm natural daylight, airy and calm mood evoking balance and wellness
Color palette: sky blue #A3CEF1 as dominant accent (background wash or prop color), pink-violet #F1B2DC as secondary highlight, silver metallic #C0C0C0 on product surface; white as neutral base
Materials/textures: smooth matte polymer or brushed metallic body, subtle leaf-vein texture on label area, water droplet condensation on one frame for freshness cue
Text (verbatim): "Evergreen"
Constraints: all four frames must feel visually cohesive as an Amazon listing set; brand colors #A3CEF1 / #F1B2DC / #C0C0C0 must appear consistently; leaf icon must be visible on product; no busy backgrounds that compete with product
Avoid: dark moody backgrounds, over-saturated colors, cluttered props, generic stock-photo aesthetic, watermarks, distorted bottle proportions
